name: Blue River Memorial Park
description: Blue River Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Shelbyville, IN. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Carl Mcneely Civic Center
description: Carl Mcneely Civic Center is a place to play pickleball in Shelbyville, IN. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Fairland Community Park
description: Fairland Community Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fairland, IN. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: SCC
description: SCC is a place to play pickleball in Shelbyville, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Shelby County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Shelby County YMCA in Shelbyville, IN! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.
